name: NBA Intel
postCreateCommand: pip install uv && sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y docker.io docker-compose zstd && curl -fsSL https://ollama.com/install.sh | sh && git config --global user.name 'Amar Agrawal' && git config --global user.email 'amaragrawal48@gmail.com'
postStartCommand: sudo chmod 666 /var/run/docker.sock && ollama serve & sleep 5 && ollama pull nomic-embed-text && ollama pull llama3.2
